title: Play as SHAW
description: This pack changes your player model so that slim skins become Hornet and wide skins become the Knight from Hollow Knight.
body:
**Have you ever wanted to play as hornet or the knight from Hollow Knight ?**

---
Well then this pack is for you!
This changes all players into either Hornet or the Knight from Hollow Knight!
Credit to [Super_Jose](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/super_jose/) for making the Hornet model used in the pack :D

This pack requires Entity Model Features + Entity Texture Features
